evidence.label: Drag marks point away from the platform story
evidence.description: The drag route suggests Rowan was moved into the station rather than killed where the body is found.
evidence.notes: Primary physical contradiction for the clean investigation route.

evidence.label: Signal Room Ledger
evidence.description: The hidden ledger explains Rowan's discovery and ties Platform 7 records to Evelyn's motive.
evidence.notes: Becomes player-facing only on the key route.

evidence.label: Platform Marker 7 placement
evidence.description: The body placement looks symbolic and points toward old Platform 7 history.
evidence.notes: Useful because it can mislead toward Silas before the ledger reframes it.

evidence.label: Fresh footprints
evidence.description: Jessa's footprints explain part of the station disturbance without proving she moved the body.
evidence.notes: Red herring evidence that can become timing support later.

evidence.label: Locker 12 key
evidence.description: The key connects Rowan, Silas's station knowledge, and the hidden ledger route.
evidence.notes: Earned through the Silas trust branch.

evidence.label: Witness heard Rowan arguing
evidence.description: The last known argument points toward Evelyn once paired with the ledger and meeting schedule.
evidence.notes: Keep imprecise until stronger evidence narrows the voice.
